title: elytrigia juncea
intro: Elytrigia juncea, also known as Junegrass or Elymus junceus, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It is used in traditional medicine due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving digestive issues, as well as supporting respiratory health and acting as a natural diuretic. Elytrigia juncea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal dosages.
